flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at White Mountains Community College fell 14% between 2006 and 2009 (39.2% → 33.7%).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at White Mountains Community College fell 10% between 2021 and 2024 (501 → 450).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at White Mountains Community College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (3.3% → 0.0%).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at White Mountains Community College rose 21% between 2021 and 2024 (69.4% → 84.0%).
